field.title: title-c61a1000-92a5-11ee-8e0d-0d26b9aa17fd
field.guid_formula:
-- Считаем количество лидов без копий
IF [internal_lead_id_kg3t] IS NOT NULL THEN
    IF [internal_lead_id_kg3t] = [leads_id_bnq0] THEN
        1
    ELSE
        0
    END
ELSEIF [leads_id_bnq0] IS NOT NULL THEN
    1
ELSE
    0
END
field.formula:
-- Считаем количество лидов без копий
IF [original_internal_id] IS NOT NULL THEN
    IF [original_internal_id] = [leads_id] THEN
        1
    ELSE
        0
    END
ELSEIF [leads_id] IS NOT NULL THEN
    1
ELSE
    0
END

field.title: title-48aabec0-92a6-11ee-8e0d-0d26b9aa17fd
field.guid_formula:
-- Учитываем что квал = валидация
IF [9dd877c0-908a-11ee-adce-3f4cebcdce6d] = 1 OR [validation_event_oj8w] = 1 THEN
    1
END
field.formula:
-- Учитываем что квал = валидация
IF [qleads] = 1 OR [validation_event] = 1 THEN
    1
END

field.title: title-61fcd4d0-92a6-11ee-8e0d-0d26b9aa17fd
field.guid_formula:
-- Если ABC, то квал. Убираем нецелевых
IF [priority_1_16lj] = "A" OR [priority_1_16lj] = "B" OR [priority_1_16lj] = "C" THEN
    1
END
field.formula:
-- Если ABC, то квал. Убираем нецелевых
IF [priority] = "A" OR [priority] = "B" OR [priority] = "C" THEN
    1
END

field.title: crv
field.formula:
IF SUM([leads]) > 0
    THEN SUM([valid_leads]) / SUM([leads])
END

field.title: crq
field.formula:
IF SUM([leads]) > 0
    THEN SUM([qleads]) / SUM([leads])
END

field.title: CPL
field.formula:
IF SUM([leads]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([avg_final_cost]) / SUM([leads])
END

field.title: CPVL
field.formula:
IF SUM([valid_leads]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([avg_final_cost]) / SUM([valid_leads])
END

field.title: CPQL
field.formula:
IF SUM([qleads]) > 0 THEN
    SUM([avg_final_cost]) / SUM([qleads])
END

field.title: title-75dce740-9514-11ee-ba14-ab9c49872b57
field.originalFormula:
IF [original_id] IS NOT NULL AND [original_internal_id] != [leads_id] THEN
    [original_date]
ELSEIF [creation_date] IS NOT NULL THEN
    [creation_date]
-- Рекламные источники
ELSEIF [day] IS NOT NULL AND [total_cost] > 0 THEN
    [day]
-- Facebook ads
ELSEIF [fb_source_date] IS NOT NULL AND [spend] > 0 THEN
    [fb_source_date]
END

items.title: title-75dce740-9514-11ee-ba14-ab9c49872b57
items.originalFormula:

    [original_date]
ELSEIF [creation_date] IS NOT NULL THEN
    [creation_date]
-- Рекламные источники
ELSEIF [day] IS NOT NULL AND [total_cost] > 0 THEN
    [day]
-- Facebook ads
ELSEIF [fb_source_date] IS NOT NULL AND [spend] > 0 THEN
    [fb_source_date]
END
